home.name: Brad Dupre
home.description: I build web applications that solve real problems — from platforms serving 35K+ users to automations that reduce 24-hour processes to under 15 minutes.

about.title: About me
about.bio: Fullstack Developer with 2+ years of experience building production-grade web applications. I specialize in backend development, API design, and process automation, with a focus on performance, scalability, and maintainability.
about.doingText: I design and develop full-stack applications end-to-end, from frontend interfaces to backend systems and cloud deployment. My experience includes enterprise authentication (SSO/LDAP), large-scale data processing, and automation of critical workflows using Python, Docker, and Azure.

rosario.description: Designing and developing production systems used by thousands of users.
responsibilities: Developed the Research Services Portal with SSO (LDAP + JWT) and REST API architecture — 35K+ visits in 8 months, 100+ daily users
Automated DOI registration using Python and Bash, eliminating manual workflows
Optimized a reporting system handling 50K+ records: reduced execution time from 24h to <15 min (80%+ improvement)
Improved performance and technical SEO across platforms built with React, PHP, and Python

omia.description: Led the development of a platform that replaced Excel-based workflows with a centralized, cloud-based system.
responsibilities: Architected and developed RRCBuilder (Flask + MySQL + Azure) for hiring and cost management
Implemented SSO authentication and deployed to production using Docker and CI/CD pipelines in Azure
Built internal tools with Django and Nginx for operational workflows
Automated business processes using Microsoft Power Platform

2de2.description: Worked in enterprise environments with SAP systems in production.
responsibilities: Developed and maintained enterprise applications on SAP S/4HANA and SAP R/3
Implemented forms and functional improvements using SAP ABAP
Provided technical support and system documentation

featured.name: Research Services Portal
featured.description: Production platform used by 35K+ users. Implements SSO authentication (LDAP + JWT), REST API architecture, and optimized institutional workflows.
featured.note: Developed in an institutional environment (code not publicly available)

items.name: Exotipet
items.description: Fullstack application with Flask backend and MySQL database. Implements structured data handling, dynamic rendering, and architecture aligned with real-world applications.

items.name: Movie App
items.description: Frontend application built with React consuming external APIs, featuring dynamic search, state management, and persistent user data handling.

items.name: Portfolio v1
items.description: First version of my portfolio focused on frontend development with React and TypeScript.

items.name: Mobile App
items.description: Android application integrated with a PHP backend and SQL database, implementing client-server communication and remote data persistence.

items.name: MVC PHP — CRUD
items.description: CRUD application built from scratch using the MVC pattern in vanilla PHP, with clear separation of concerns, custom routing, and structured business logic.
